title: Rainbase Pulls the Trap Tight
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on rainbase pulls the trap tight, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Rainbase Pulls the Trap Tight. The trapped crew survives Crocodile’s death trap and scrambles to continue the mission before the war reaches Alubarna. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Certainly as you say, the impending violent clash between the royal guards and the rebels might be averted.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: I'd give or take about 8 hours before the final clash begins...

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: I daresay you're running short on time...

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: It'll most likely take longer than 8 hours to get from here to Alubarma even if you hurry...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: So if you intend on stopping the rebel- lion, you better leave right away,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Lest you wish for tens of thousands to die in vain...!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: But at the same time, you can also stay behind and try to save your friends here.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I've carelessly dropped the key to this cage in the room below.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: The choice is yours, Ms. Wednesday...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Look, look! Those bananas have crocodiles growing out of 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: And we're Underwa- Ter right now!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Don't be stupid, it's the other way around. The bananas are growing from the crocodiles.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: What! Well get down there and make it cough up the key!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Bamanadiles are ferocious creatures which can even prey on Sea Kings!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'll be eaten as soon as I get near one of them!

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: These buggers have a tendency to think of anything dropped down in that room as food.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Not only that, you can't even tell which bananadile swallowed the key just now, can you...

summary: This part develops rainbase pulls the trap tight and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
